title: Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple
tagline: Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple(திருந்துதேவன்குடி கற்கடகேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirundudevankudi in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple(திருந்துதேவன்குடி கற்கடகேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirundudevankudi in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Karkteeswaram and Nandankoil. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Karkadeswarar.

topPlaces.name: Veppathur
topPlaces.description: Veppathur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Veppathur was originally known as Nimmapuram (meaning "Neem Village" in Sanskrit).

topPlaces.name: Vilandakandam
topPlaces.description: Vilandakandam is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Agarathur
topPlaces.description: Agarathur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. Agarthur is a village near Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Kampaheswarar Temple, Thirubuvanam
topPlaces.description: The Kampaheswarar Temple or kampa-hara-ishvarar ( kampa-hareswarar ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva. It is situated in Thirubuvanam, a village in Thanjavur district in the South Indian State of Tamil Nadu, on the Mayiladuthurai-Kumbakonam road.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvisanallur Sivayoginathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivayoginathar Temple also known as Yoganandeswarar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in is located in Thiruvisanallur in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as purathaneshwarar in krutha yuga,yoganandheeswarar in threytha yuga,vilvaaranyeshwarar in dhwabara yuga and Sivayoganathar in kali yuga, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as soundhara nayaki or shantha Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Sarangapanipettai
topPlaces.description: Sarangapanipettai is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Ammachatram
topPlaces.description: Ammachatram is a village situated 6 km from Kumbakonam (Temple Town) to Mayiladuthurai route on [State Highway (SH - 64)] and 277 km away from Chennai. The village is called Mela Ammachatram (West) and Ammachatram (East) that's centered in between UmaMaheswarapuram, Thirunageswaram(Famous for Rahu and Oppiliappan temple), Kumbakonam and Mayiladuthurai which is nearby the panchayat of Thepperumalnallur (famous for its Bhagavatha mela) and comes under Kumbakonam and Thiruvidaimarudur Taluk in Thanjavur District.

topPlaces.name: Kallur, Kumbakonam
topPlaces.description: Kallur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Veppathur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Veppathur was originally known as Nimmapuram (meaning "Neem Village" in Sanskrit).
Vilandakandam is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.
Agarathur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. Agarthur is a village near Kumbakonam.

The Kampaheswarar Temple or kampa-hara-ishvarar ( kampa-hareswarar ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva. It is situated in Thirubuvanam, a village in Thanjavur district in the South Indian State of Tamil Nadu, on the Mayiladuthurai-Kumbakonam road.

Sivayoginathar Temple also known as Yoganandeswarar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in is located in Thiruvisanallur in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as purathaneshwarar in krutha yuga,yoganandheeswarar in threytha yuga,vilvaaranyeshwarar in dhwabara yuga and Sivayoganathar in kali yuga, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as soundhara nayaki or shantha Nayagi.
Sarangapanipettai is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Ammachatram is a village situated 6 km from Kumbakonam (Temple Town) to Mayiladuthurai route on [State Highway (SH - 64)] and 277 km away from Chennai. The village is called Mela Ammachatram (West) and Ammachatram (East) that's centered in between UmaMaheswarapuram, Thirunageswaram(Famous for Rahu and Oppiliappan temple), Kumbakonam and Mayiladuthurai which is nearby the panchayat of Thepperumalnallur (famous for its Bhagavatha mela) and comes under Kumbakonam and Thiruvidaimarudur Taluk in Thanjavur District.
Kallur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirundudevankudi Karkadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Veppathur, Vilandakandam, Agarathur, Kampaheswarar Temple, Thirubuvanam, Thiruvisanallur Sivayoginathar Temple.
